title: ジャパンカップにむけて

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At last, the Japan Cup is here. We arrive at the
track in the morning, focused and ready.

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
Ah... Grass Wonder and her trainer! Good
morning!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Oh, good morning. Have you come to watch my
race once again?

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
Of course! I wouldn't dream of missing the Beast's
Successor!

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
Oh! That reminds me! Have you two seen the
article everyone's been talking about online?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Which one, if I may ask?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After a few quick taps, the reporter holds up a
screen to show a news site known for its Arima
Kinen predictions.

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
Everyone knows the Arima Kinen is one of the
biggest races—only the best classic and senior
year Umamusume are voted in!

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
Take a look at their predictions on who will run
this year!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Oh, my...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Both Maruzen and myself are on this list.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Grass Wonder has spent her classic year building
up experience specifically to challenge
Maruzensky.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: This might be Grass's big chance to race her!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Maruzensky and I, on the same track at the Arima Kinen... Hehe, that would be an honor.

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! It's because of Maruzensky that you've
been gathering so much attention! Personally, I
can't wait!

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
Of course, I'm excited to see how you do today,
as well! Do your best out there!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: ...It's almost time.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Yes. Let's be on our way.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Grass!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: If it isn't El. Did you come here to get me?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Sí, sí! I've come to be your guide!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: I've got a race to win here, and it's gonna be flashy! Grrrass Wonder, enter the riiiiing!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, the ring? Are you sure we're going to the
same place?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I'm headed to the track, to take the title of
"Beast's Successor"...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: And leave it in the dust.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Leave it, eh?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Whatever you say! Now c'mon, Grass! To the
paddock!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Yes. Trainer, I should be off.
